signal_title: Draft Guidelines on Protection of Minors Online under the Digital Services Act (DSA)
risk_rationale: The draft guidelines under the DSA propose new requirements for age verification and content recommendation systems specifically for minors, which may necessitate immediate product changes to comply with EU regulations.

compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Improved content recommendation systems for minors
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The current baseline requires reduced personalization for minors under 16, but the new guidelines may require further improvements to content recommendation systems to better shield minors from harmful content.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Restricted Mode available; auto-enabled for <13 flagged accounts
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The baseline does not currently include specific age verification mechanisms, which are now required by the new guidelines.

remediations.title: Enhance Content Recommendation Systems
remediations.description: Develop and implement improved content recommendation algorithms that further restrict exposure to harmful content for minors, in line with the new EU guidelines.
acceptance_criteria: Content recommendation systems are updated to comply with EU guidelines
Testing shows reduced exposure to harmful content for minors

remediations.title: Implement Age Verification Mechanisms
remediations.description: Introduce robust age verification mechanisms to ensure compliance with the new EU guidelines on protecting minors online.
acceptance_criteria: Age verification mechanisms are implemented and operational
Compliance with EU guidelines is verified through testing

business_impact: Failure to comply with the new EU guidelines could result in significant fines and restrictions on operations within the EU market, impacting user growth and engagement.
recommended_actions: Initiate a project to enhance content recommendation systems for minors
Develop and implement age verification mechanisms
Engage with EU regulators to ensure compliance with draft guidelines
